description_long: This is a modern, cubic house with a flat roof, featuring large floor-to-ceiling glass windows on multiple sides that allow for ample natural light. The structure is composed of interlocking rectangular volumes, with a rooftop garden populated by several tall palm trees and leafy plants. The main facade showcases a prominent glass wall, revealing a contemporary interior with open-plan living and dining areas. The house includes multiple levels, with visible staircases and a balcony or terrace area on the upper floor. The exterior is finished in a combination of smooth white and dark gray surfaces, creating a striking contrast. The entryway is recessed and partially sheltered, with a small set of steps leading up to the door.
description: A modern, multi-level house with large glass windows, flat roof, and a rooftop garden with palm trees. The exterior features white and dark gray surfaces in a cubic, geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view showing large glass windows, the main entryway with steps, and a glimpse of the open-plan interior.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rooftop garden with palm trees and minimal window openings on this facade.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by a solid wall and the rooftop garden, with minimal architectural detailing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying extensive glass walls, interior living spaces, and the rooftop garden above.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with steps, minimal overhang, and large glass panels
